description: Parse ACORD insurance XML messages (P&C and Life) — flatten any ACORD envelope into one row per Policy / Claim / Application. Auto-detects namespaces; carries message-level metadata into every row.

upstream_asset_key.label: Upstream Asset Key
upstream_asset_key.description: DataFrame asset with raw ACORD XML in one column

xml_column.label: XML Column
xml_column.description: Name of the column containing ACORD XML strings (default 'xml').

name: ACORD XML Parser
